pullRequest.title: PLAT-9854: Update repo-standards-orb and use the new catalog v2 commands

nodes.body: This has been a no-op because the `build-test-and-sonar` job isn't a required job when creating catalogs, so the results haven't been used.

_⚠️ Potential issue_ | _🟠 Major_

<details>
<summary>🧩 Analysis chain</summary>

🏁 Script executed:

```shell
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

echo "Legacy catalog command usage in CircleCI config:"
rg -n --type=yaml 'repo-standards/create_catalog:' .circleci || true
echo
echo "Legacy catalog-check command usage in CircleCI config:"
rg -n --type=yaml 'repo-standards/create_catalog_check:' .circleci || true
rg -n --type=yaml 'repo-standards/create_catalog_checks:' .circleci || true
```

Repository: cerebrotech/domino

Length of output: 236

---



</details>

**Migrate legacy catalog command at line 109 to v2 to complete the migration.**

You've migrated these jobs to `create_catalog_v2` and `create_catalog_check_v2` (lines 968-977), but `create_scale_test_deployment_and_persist_id` still calls the legacy `repo-standards/create_catalog` at line 109. Once the deprecated catalog endpoints are removed, this workflow will fail.

<details>
<summary>🤖 Prompt for AI Agents</summary>

```
Verify each finding against the current code and only fix it if needed.

In @.circleci/static-build.yml around lines 968 - 977, The workflow job
create_scale_test_deployment_and_persist_id is still invoking the legacy orb
command repo-standards/create_catalog; replace that call with
repo-standards/create_catalog_v2 inside
create_scale_test_deployment_and_persist_id and adjust the arguments to match
the v2 parameter names used elsewhere (e.g., filename, base_branch, debug) so
the job uses the new create_catalog_v2 interface and will remain compatible when
the old endpoints are removed.
```

</details>
